channel.title: mobile on Observer
channel.description: Recent content in mobile on Observer

item.title: Rtfm for Mobiles (Android)
item.description: RTFM for mobiles #pentest #mobile #fieldmanual ADB adb devices adb shell su adb kill-server See logs: adb logcat > log.txt Port forwarding example: adb forward tcp:31415 tcp:31415 JDB Useful to watch regarding debugging in Android applications Get PID list: Either
